violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

Utensils were observed stored with the handle touching the lemonade. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as lemonade must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

Establishment does not have a service sink. At least 1 service sink or 1 curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain shall be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Service sink must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
Menu is lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by fruit flies on the Dels machine and utensils. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control services must be contacted. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

Utensils were observed stored with the handle touching the lemonade. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as lemonade must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
Hot water was not available at the handwashing sink. Establishment must fix the handwashing sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

Establishment does not have a service sink. At least 1 service sink or 1 curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain shall be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Service sink must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
Menu is lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

The Person in charge was not knowledgeable of how to wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment. The person in charge must demonstrate to the health department knowledge of foodborne disease prevention, application of HACCP principles, and the requirements of this Code. Per person in charge, another employee washes, rinses and sanitizes the equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. An employee illness policy was given to the person in charge during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Written procedures were given to the person in charge during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
Chemicals were stored above food/equipment/single service articles on the storage rack. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by fruit flies on the Dels machine and utensils. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control services must be contacted. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant liquid between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

Utensils were observed stored with the handle touching the lemonade. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as lemonade must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
Hot water was not available at the handwashing sink next to the 3-bay sink. Establishment must fix the handwashing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023

Establishment does not have a service sink. At least 1 service sink or 1 curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain shall be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2023
